reviews.comment:
Única parada entre san juan y quines (unos 330km) y la verdad que no dan ganas de detenerte salvo rigurosa necesidad....el espacio de sombra lleno de  suciedad , los parrilleros rotos, muy abandonado . No entre a los baños así que de eso no opino . En Quines hicieron una YPF nueva que da gusto parar...ojalá algún día pase lo mismo en el Encon

(Translated by Google)
The only stop between San Juan and Quines (about 330km) and honestly, you don't feel like stopping unless absolutely necessary... the shaded area is filthy, the grills are broken, very neglected. I didn't go into the restrooms, so I can't comment on that. In Quines, they built a new YPF gas station that's a pleasure to stop at... I hope the same happens someday in Encon.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25NM2NGQlBNVVJFUVhvMlpsWk9WRVJGYkZOV1RWRRAB

reviews.comment:
a diferencia del resto yo encontre los baños en buenas condiciones, tal vez sea por que no fui en una hora muy concurrida en la ruta. la verdad que para estar en el medio del desierto esta bien!

(Translated by Google)
Unlike everyone else, I found the restrooms in good condition; perhaps it's because I didn't go during peak travel time. Honestly, for being in the middle of the desert, it's fine!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xOdVkzaDNTMW80VFhWMGNVSm5SWE5WTlhaV2RtYxAB
